calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Catherine Yee for Administrator, Tracy Leung.

The Court inquires if the only asset is the real property and whether there is anything else that would be distributed to Ms. Huang. Ms. Yee presented courtesy copies of proposed order addressing issues raised by the Probate Examiner, stating decedent's real property goes to only one daughter and any other property for 4 children, and that the property is used as a Buddhist temple with no plans to change right now. The Court noted it is not inclined to include language on what parties want to do with property or restrictions after it passes to the daughter.

The Amended First and Final Report of Administration on Waiver of Account is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
